== Notes for [[Item:Q98272|Q98272]] ==

This Jacob was presumably the descendant of King David of the Jews, but we have no documentation about that.

Broken link: [http://www.hostkingdom.net/regindex.html Regnal Chronologies, online], Mesopotamia & Arabia, the Resh Galuta.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702EFBACB2131EFBBF89829A6488A4D5720
geni:6000000000802700021

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
